name: Coinbase Global, Inc.
summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. is a cryptocurrency exchange platform that enables retail and institutional customers to buy, sell, trade, and custody crypto assets including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins. The company offers transaction services, subscription and services revenue streams, stablecoin-related products (USDC), and supports an onchain economy through products including self-custodial wallets, DeFi access, staking, and Layer 2 blockchain infrastructure.

products.name: Crypto Trading Platform
products.description: Exchange platform supporting trading of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other crypto assets for retail and institutional users.

products.name: Custody Services
products.description: Secure storage and custody of crypto assets using cold storage and hot wallet infrastructure.

products.name: Staking Services
products.description: Allows users to stake tokens to validate transactions and earn rewards on supported blockchains.

products.name: Self-Custodial Wallet
products.description: Wallet product where users hold their own private keys, enabling direct onchain interaction.

products.name: USDC Stablecoin Services
products.description: Revenue-generating services related to USDC stablecoin, a major component of subscription and services revenue.

products.name: Layer 2 Blockchain
products.description: L2 blockchain infrastructure layered on L1 blockchains to improve scaling and transaction throughput.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
